name: Lmon.grassFrac
title: Natural Grass Area Percentage
description: Percentage of entire grid cell that is covered by natural grass.
processing note: add scalar coordinate typegrass and add "natural\_grass" to the CF area type table.  Note that if this variable is independent of time, it should be stored only for a single time (user choice). CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Cell Methods - CMIP6:area: mean where land over all\_area\_types time: mean CMIP7:area: time: mean,
